name: Longduoduo Co Ltd
business: Longduoduo Co Ltd, through its Chinese subsidiaries, sells preventive healthcare solutions including disease screening and treatments, and acts as a sales agent for third-party healthcare services, primarily for Inner Mongolia Honghai Health Management Co., Ltd.
sellsTo: individual consumers in Inner Mongolia cities such as Hohhot, Ordos, Baotou, and Ulanqab
namedSuppliers: Inner Mongolia Honghai Health Management Co., Ltd.
Hohhot Aihua Traditional Chinese Medicine Hospital
Inner Mongolia Jiuzun Health Examination Co., Ltd
Ulanqab Mengzhong Rehabilitation TCM Hospital Co., Ltd

exposures.sentence: The Company mainly focuses on prevention of myocardial infarction, cerebral infarction, hemiplegia, and cardiovascular and cerebrovascular diseases.

A computer system failure, security breach or a breach of data privacy or security obligations may disrupt our business, damage our reputation and adversely affect our results of operations, financial condition and cash flows.
